config.script:
selected_item = self.getSibling("Tree").props.selectionData[0].value
	
	if selected_item == "/usr/local/bin/ignition/data/db/config.idb":
		system.perspective.openPopup(	"open_file", 
								"MIGRATED_TABLES_8_3", 
								title=selected_item, 
								showCloseIcon=True, 
								draggable=True, 
								resizable=True, 
								modal=False, 
								overlayDismiss=False)
	else:
		system.perspective.openPopup(	"open_file", 
										"Templates/File_Viewer", 
										params={"file_path": selected_item, "show_buttons":True}, 
										title=selected_item, 
										showCloseIcon=True, 
										draggable=True, 
										resizable=True, 
										modal=False, 
										overlayDismiss=False)
